title: MintCore & CashMint Studio – Builder-First CashTokens Stack
description: Funding MintCore (CashTokens SDK) and CashMint Studio (creator minting platform) to deliver a clean, documented, production-ready stack for the Bitcoin Cash ecosystem.

milestones.name: MintCore v1 Release
milestones.description: Finalized APIs, improved error handling, consistent transaction-building patterns, and a clean developer experience for the first stable release.

milestones.name: CashMint Studio: Creator-Friendly Minting Flow
milestones.description: Complete minting flow with intuitive UI steps, safe defaults, clear validation, and a guided experience for creators minting fungible tokens and NFTs.

milestones.name: Documentation and Examples
milestones.description: Thorough documentation for MintCore and CashMint Studio, including examples, walkthroughs, and practical guides for developers and creators.

milestones.name: Accessibility and UX Improvements
milestones.description: Improved layout, readability, keyboard navigation, mobile responsiveness, and overall clarity so the Studio feels welcoming and easy to use for everyone.

milestones.name: Testing, Stability, and Final Polish
milestones.description: Strengthened test coverage, improved stability, tightened edge cases, and final polish to ensure both MintCore and the Studio are ready for real-world use.
